content:
<1>This {{aiProvider}} is currently set as the default.</1>
 Deleting it will revoke access for all users, and its settings will be permanently erased.
 Another provider will be set as default automatically and can be changed later in settings.

comment.text: This is a warning message displayed in a dialog when a user attempts to delete the default AI provider. It informs the user about the consequences of deletion and that a new default will be automatically assigned. `{{aiProvider}}` will be replaced with the name of the AI provider, and `<1>` is a tag for bold formatting.
